fixture: 025_multi_insert_select

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE stock (id INTEGER NOT NULL, qty INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO stock VALUES (1, 5)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO stock VALUES (2, 7)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO stock VALUES (3, 9)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT id, qty FROM stock
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
      [1] qty INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 1 | 5
      [1] 2 | 7
      [2] 3 | 9
